content.doc: Serve runs the JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio loop. It reads newline-delimited requests from in and writes responses to out. Blocks until in is closed or returns an unrecoverable read error.  stdout (out) is reserved for JSON-RPC only. Human-readable output goes to stderr.
content.name: Serve
